testcase.name: test_batch_returns_three_styles

failure.message: AssertionError: expected >=2 successful portraits, got 1: [('photoreal', None), ('painterly', 'ChatError'), ('stylized', 'ChatError')] assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = len([{'image_base64': '...', 'mime_type': 'image/jpeg', 'prompt': 'Portrait of a Dwarf Cleric. grey beard, holy symbol. photorealistic high-fantasy portrait, cinematic lighting, dramatic rim light, rich detail, D&D character art style, painterly realism. Head and shoulders composition, centered, neutral background, no text, no watermark, no logo.', 'style': 'photoreal'}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter92_ai_portrait.py:165: in test_batch_returns_three_styles assert len(non_empty) >= 2, ( E AssertionError: expected >=2 successful portraits, got 1: [('photoreal', None), ('painterly', 'ChatError'), ('stylized', 'ChatError')] E assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len([{'image_base64': '...', 'mime_type': 'image/jpeg', 'prompt': 'Portrait of a Dwarf Cleric. grey beard, holy symbol. photorealistic high-fantasy portrait, cinematic lighting, dramatic rim light, rich detail, D&D character art style, painterly realism. Head and shoulders composition, centered, neutral background, no text, no watermark, no logo.', 'style': 'photoreal'}])
